purpose: Deliver buyer-visible Google/VK login completion and preserve cart continuity through the existing secure merge boundary.
success_outcome: Both login choices establish customer state and converge on merged/no-source readiness, with recoverable merge failure preventing silent checkout continuation.
anti_goals: Do not change FT-003 backend merge behavior.
Do not add checkout fields, orders, or payments.
Do not display provider payloads or customer PII.

success_checks: Completion retrieves customer and calls existing merge handoff.
Merge failure preserves session/source, blocks continuation, and leaks no callback data or PII.
evidence_required: Build, typecheck, lint, T3 human checkpoint, and recovery note.

stop_conditions: Existing FT-003 handoff cannot represent success/no-source/recoverable failure.
Completion requires exposing provider query or token data to UI.
Auth state cannot remain truthful during merge retry.
required_handoff: Report changed_files, commands_run, evidence, scope_compliance, and blockers_or_none.
Run /verify and /red-verify; record HUMAN_CHECKPOINT and ROLLBACK_RECOVERY_NOTE before T3 closure.
